root: ^Once upon a time, there was a brave adventurer standing at a crossroads.

dark_forest: ^You venture into the dark forest. The trees are thick and the path is unclear.

c-0: ^You bravely fight the wolf and emerge victorious!
c-1: ^You run as fast as you can back to the crossroads.

sunny_village: ^You walk towards the sunny village. The people greet you warmly.
^The village elder offers you a quest.

c-0: ^"Thank you, brave adventurer!" says the elder.
^You set off on a grand adventure!
c-1: ^You decide to rest in the village instead.

stay: ^You decide to stay at the crossroads, waiting for inspiration.
^After a while, you realize that sometimes the best adventure is the one you choose yourself.
victory: ^Your journey has come to a successful end.
